Title: MemorySmith.Agent — HTN Planner & PlannerRouter Architecture
Content:
The planning system routes goals through a two-layer architecture: a DecomposerRegistry for specialized decomposers, falling back to the HtnPlanner for generic HTN task decomposition.

## IPlanner Interface (Agent.Planning/Interfaces/IPlanner.cs)

- PlanAsync(IGoal, WorldState, CancellationToken) → IPlan
- ReplanAsync(IPlan, WorldState, failureReason, CancellationToken, originalGoal?) → IPlan?

## PlannerRouter (Agent.Planning/Router/PlannerRouter.cs)

Takes DecomposerRegistry + fallback IPlanner (HtnPlanner). Select routing order:
1. registry.Find(goal) → returns DecomposerPlanner wrapping the found IGoalDecomposer
2. Falls back to htnPlanner

ReplanAsync uses originalGoal to preserve concrete goal type for decomposer routing — prevents silently falling through to HtnPlanner.

DecomposerPlanner (private sealed class, line 147-170): thin adapter wrapping a single IGoalDecomposer as IPlanner.

## DecomposerRegistry (Agent.Planning/Decomposition/DecomposerRegistry.cs)

Thread-safe list of IGoalDecomposer. Methods: Register (thread-safe add), Find (returns first CanHandle match), All (snapshot).

## IGoalDecomposer Interface

- CanHandle(IGoal goal) → bool
- Decompose(IGoal goal, WorldState state) → ActionPlan

## Registered Decomposers (Agent.Planning/Decomposition/)

| Decomposer | Handles | Logic |
|-----------|---------|-------|
| BuildGoalDecomposer | BuildGoal | Origin resolution (chat→facts→FindFlatArea), delegates to HtnTaskLibrary.DecomposeBuild |
| GatherGoalDecomposer | GatherWoodGoal, IItemSpecGoal | Decomposes gather into MineBlock actions for target item |
| CraftItemGoalDecomposer | CraftItemGoal | Decomposes craft into prerequisite gathering + crafting table placement + craft action |

## HtnPlanner (Agent.Planning/HtnPlanner.cs)

PlanAsync handles:
- BuildGoal: creative → CreateCreativeBuildActions (SearchMemory+MoveTo+PlaceBlock with checkpoint resumption); survival → library.DecomposeBuild
- CraftItemGoal: library.DecomposeCraftItem
- IItemSpecGoal: library.DecomposeGatherItem
- Direct task-library name match
- Phase-by-phase fallback (iterates IGoal.Phases, decomposes each)
- Throws InvalidOperationException if no actions result

ReplanAsync: logs failureReason, preserves context keys (SearchMemory:, CraftItem:, FindFlatArea:, Build:, MoveTo:), creates SimpleGoal, calls PlanAsync, preserves context on new plan. Returns null on exception.

## HtnTaskLibrary (Agent.Planning/HtnTaskLibrary.cs)

8 task methods:
- GatherWood: SearchMemory('wood trees') → GetStatus → MineBlock(oak_log, N) → GetStatus
- FindTree: SearchMemory('nearest tree') → GetStatus
- MineWood: MineBlock(oak_log, N) + MineBlock(birch_log, N)
- Collect: GetStatus
- SurviveNight: SearchMemory('shelter') → GetStatus
- FindShelter: SearchMemory('shelter') → GetStatus
- LightArea: GetStatus
- WaitForSunrise: GetStatus

## Creative vs Survival

- Creative mode: HtnPlanner.CreateCreativeBuildActions generates SearchMemory → MoveTo → PlaceBlock actions with checkpoint resumption via BuildFactKeys.BuildProgressIndex. Requires BlueprintExecutor.
- Survival mode: Full HTN decomposition with gather/craft phases via task library.

## AgentJournal (Agent.Core/IAgentJournal)

Bounded diagnostic buffer (1000 entries, ConcurrentQueue, in-process only). 11 event types: GoalSet, GoalCancel, PlanCreated, ActionDispatched, ActionCompleted, ActionFailed, ReplanTriggered, AgentStarted, AgentStopped, plus validation/execution events from ToolDispatcher. Not durable — does not survive process restart.
